tasks.title: Add handleReorderStep(taskId, column, direction) to Board.tsx
tasks.description: Add a one-step reorder handler that reuses computeDropRank against the adjacent rank-neighbor in useAppStore.getState().tasks[column]. 'up' → neighbor at index-1, insertBefore=true; 'down' → neighbor at index+1, insertBefore=false. Apply the rebalance branch exactly like handleDrop (iterate rebalancedTasks) or call reorderTask(taskId,column,newRank). No-op when at the respective edge or while isMutating. Pass the handler down through Column to TaskCard.
acceptance_criteria: Calling handleReorderStep('id','todo','up') on a mid-list card calls reorderTask with a rank between its previous two neighbors
'up' on the first card and 'down' on the last card are no-ops (no reorderTask call)
No call is made while isMutating is true
When rank gap collapses, the rebalance branch runs and every rebalanced task is persisted
useDragStore and the existing HTML5 drag handlers are untouched

tasks.title: Extend CardActionMenu with move-up / move-down buttons
tasks.description: Add onMoveUp / onMoveDown optional props and render two 28x28 icon buttons (keyboard_arrow_up / keyboard_arrow_down or arrow_upward/arrow_downward — UX stage confirms) reusing the existing icon-button Tailwind classes. Buttons disabled via a canMoveUp/canMoveDown (edge) flag and while isMutating. aria-label 'Move up' / 'Move down' + matching title. Keep role="toolbar". Buttons omitted/hidden when their callback is undefined.
acceptance_criteria: Renders up and down buttons when onMoveUp/onMoveDown provided
Up button disabled on the first card; down button disabled on the last card
Both disabled while isMutating
Buttons are native <button type="button">, focusable, 28x28, design-system classes only (no style={{}})
aria-label and title present and correct

tasks.title: Wire index/edge + onReorderStep through Column and TaskCard; remove coarse drag handle
tasks.description: Column.tsx already knows each card's position (globalIndex / group.tasks) — compute isFirst/isLast within the column's rank order and pass them plus onReorderStep to TaskCard. TaskCard forwards onMoveUp=()=>onReorderStep(id,column,'up') / onMoveDown into CardActionMenu with canMoveUp/canMoveDown. Remove the [@media(pointer:coarse)]:opacity-30 drag-handle affordance so touch no longer shows a dead grab handle (keep the hover-only handle on fine pointers).
acceptance_criteria: Each TaskCard receives correct isFirst/isLast for its column position (works with arc grouping on and off)
Tapping up/down triggers handleReorderStep and the card visibly moves (optimistic)
The drag_indicator handle is no longer shown/affordant under coarse-pointer emulation
Fine-pointer hover drag handle and HTML5 drag reorder are unchanged

tasks.title: Unit tests (Vitest + RTL)
tasks.description: Cover handleReorderStep (up/down, edge no-ops, isMutating no-op, rebalance branch), CardActionMenu (renders + disables edges + fires callbacks), and TaskCard (no coarse-pointer drag affordance). >90% coverage of the changed lines.
acceptance_criteria: handleReorderStep tests cover up, down, both edges, isMutating, and rebalance
CardActionMenu tests assert edge-disabled state and callback firing
TaskCard test asserts the coarse-pointer drag handle is absent/non-interactive
cd frontend && npm test passes

tasks.title: E2E verification on touch emulation (Playwright)
tasks.description: Under coarse-pointer / mobile emulation: tap up on 2nd card → becomes 1st (order + persisted); tap down on 1st → becomes 2nd; up disabled on first, down on last. Regression: cross-column arrows still work on touch; fine-pointer HTML5 drag reorder still works. Screenshots on failure.
acceptance_criteria: Touch up/down reorder changes DOM order and persists across reload
Edge buttons correctly disabled
Cross-column move on touch still works (regression)
Mouse HTML5 drag reorder still works (regression)
